notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman grounds into a double play, second baseman Amed Rosario to shortstop Max Schuemann to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Gunnar Henderson out at 2nd. Adley Rutschman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman grounds into a double play, second baseman Amed Rosario to shortstop Max Schuemann to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Gunnar Henderson out at 2nd. Adley Rutschman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.label: Leody Taveras pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Leody Taveras grounds out to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson reaches on a fielder's choice. Coby Mayo to 2nd. Coby Mayo advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Max Schuemann.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.label: Ben Rice GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice grounds into a double play, first baseman Pete Alonso to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Aaron Judge out at 2nd. Ben Rice out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jazz Chisholm Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. flies out to center fielder Colton Cowser.
